notes: Solid, feature-complete Snake implementation with smooth interpolation, pause/title/victory states, high score persistence, and progressive speed increase; minor issue is the interpolation logic for body segments moves them toward the previous segment rather than their own next position, causing slight visual jitter on turns, but overall very playable.

Smooth interpolation logic is flawed, causing the head and first body segment to overlap and the tail to vanish abruptly; input queuing overwrites pending moves, causing missed inputs during fast cornering.

A solid and polished Snake clone with working states and scoring, but input handling is limited to one queued turn per frame and self-collision is stricter than classic tail-move behavior, which slightly hurts control fidelity and gameplay.
